review_text: if i didn't have this app id die😙✌🏼
summary: The user expresses extreme satisfaction and love for the Spotify app.

review_text: I love it, but if there is way too many ads
summary: The user loves the app but is frustrated by the excessive number of ads.

review_text: I noticed every time i’m on a discord call with friends, and it’s only discord, that my song on spotify will pause every so often like every 30 seconds and it doesn’t keep playing until I leave the call. Please fix this it’s been like this for months and months.
summary: The user reports a persistent bug where Spotify pauses repeatedly when on a Discord call.
feature_requests: fix pausing bug during Discord calls
user_goal: listen to music while on a Discord call
root_cause: software conflict or bug causing playback interruption during Discord calls

review_text: So buggy, I can’t hop onto a jam with my Girlfriend without it completely glitching out on me. This app used to be so good and now it’s just buns!
summary: The user is frustrated by a bug preventing them from using the Jam feature with their girlfriend.
root_cause: software bug in the Jam feature

review_text: Bring back the daily drive mix
summary: The user requests the return of the Daily Drive mix feature.
user_goal: listen to the Daily Drive mix
root_cause: removal or unavailability of the Daily Drive mix feature
discovery_issue: The user wants the Daily Drive mix feature to be reinstated.

summary: The user praises Spotify for its music availability.

review_text: It's so great to just listen to your favorite songs everywhere on headphones in stores,car rides and more
summary: The user appreciates the ability to listen to their favorite songs anywhere.
user_goal: listen to favorite music on the go

review_text: The free version is terrible. Bro you can only do 6 skips per hour and then it gives you a whole bunch of recommendations into the playlists you're listening to! like bro when I make a playlist I like it how it is I don't need some robot to recommend things for it! like seriously! I pay for premium now, because it's worth it, but barely. The paid version is excellent but very expensive.
summary: The user criticizes the free version's skip limits and unwanted playlist recommendations, finding the premium version excellent but expensive.
user_goal: listen to music without interruptions or unwanted changes, manage personal playlists
root_cause: free tier limitations are too restrictive; recommendation algorithm injects unwanted songs into user-curated playlists; premium pricing is too high
discovery_issue: The recommendation system injects unwanted songs into user-created playlists on the free tier.

review_text: I adore the app, but at this rate going to YouTube is better lately as I can at least skip ads, no premium needed. Not 1 ad, not 2 but now 3 back to back ads?? Couldn't get a little more greedy now could you! Make it easier for the people who can't get premium. We are listening to more ads than actual music! And the ads suck just by the way, so uninteresting. Still love the app, but please just remove at least one damn ad, or at least allow us to skip it. Don't get greedy now, you are making $$$
summary: The user loves the app but is angered by the increasing number of unskippable and uninteresting ads on the free tier, comparing it unfavorably to YouTube.
feature_requests: allow skipping ads on free tier
user_goal: listen to music with minimal interruption on the free tier
root_cause: increasing ad frequency and unskippable nature on the free tier

review_text: At first, I enjoyed it before this current update. But now, it's getting greedy and unenjoyable. We have to pay for Spotify premium for basic interactions like choosing songs to play, I thought WE are the ones choosing the songs?? why is it suddenly limited? And to skip songs? It's just absurd to me and alot of listeners. And the ads are increasing, It's disturbing our listening experience. I suggest remove the limitations and decrease the ads.
summary: The user is angry about recent updates that limit basic features like song selection and skipping on the free tier, and the increasing number of ads.
pain_points: cannot choose specific songs to play on free tier
limited song skips on free tier
feature_requests: remove free tier limitations on song selection
user_goal: choose and skip songs freely on the free tier, listen to music without excessive ads
root_cause: recent product changes that restrict free tier functionality and increase ad frequency
